nasb.text: and in your knowledge, self-control, and in your self-control, perseverance, and in your perseverance, godliness,

esv.text: and knowledge with self-control, and self-control with steadfastness, and steadfastness with godliness,

cnv.text: 有了知識，又要增添節制；有了節制，又要增添忍耐；有了忍耐，又要增添敬虔；

ccb.text: 不仅要有知识，还要有节制；不仅要有节制，还要有忍耐；不仅要有忍耐，还要有敬虔；

csbs.text: 在知识上加自制；在自制上加忍耐；在忍耐上加敬神；
